metadata.description: Azure region where the workbook resource will be stored.
Workbook display name shown in Azure Monitor.
Primary resource id associated to the workbook (typically the Log Analytics workspace id).
Log Analytics workspace id used by workbook KQL queries.
Application Insights component id used as a fallback data source.

content.json:
# Verdecora · Observabilidad operativa

Seguimiento de volumen, éxito, errores, latencia de agentes y backlog HITL para el flujo de albaranes.

content.query:
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| extend dims = column_ifexists("Properties", dynamic({}))
| extend albaranId = coalesce(tostring(dims["albaran_id"]), tostring(dims["albaranId"]), OperationId)
| summarize Albaranes = dcount(albaranId) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Albaranes procesados por hora

content.query:
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(14d)
| extend dims = column_ifexists("Properties", dynamic({}))
| extend albaranId = coalesce(tostring(dims["albaran_id"]), tostring(dims["albaranId"]), OperationId)
| summarize Albaranes = dcount(albaranId) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Albaranes procesados por día

content.query:
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| extend dims = column_ifexists("Properties", dynamic({}))
| extend result = coalesce(tostring(dims["result"]), tostring(dims["routing_decision"]), Name)
| extend Resultado = case(result in ("approve", "posted", "success"), "Éxito", result in ("hitl_review", "pending_hitl", "manual_review"), "HITL", "Fallo")
| summarize Eventos = count() by Resultado
content.title: Ratio de éxito, fallo y HITL

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| extend dims = column_ifexists("Properties", dynamic({}))
| extend customDimensions = column_ifexists("CustomDimensions", dynamic({}))
| extend agentName = coalesce(tostring(customDimensions["agent_name"]), tostring(customDimensions["agent_id"]), tostring(dims["agent_name"]), tostring(dims["agent_id"]), Name)
| where agentName has_any ("A1", "A2", "A3", "A4", "A5", "A6", "extractor", "triage", "coherence", "validator", "inventory", "communication")
| summarize Avg_ms = avg(DurationMs), P95_ms = percentile(DurationMs, 95), Total = count() by agentName
| order by P95_ms desc
content.title: Latencia por agente (A1-A6)

content.query:
AppTraces
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where SeverityLevel >= 3
| extend dims = column_ifexists("Properties", dynamic({}))
| extend ErrorType = coalesce(tostring(dims["error_type"]), tostring(dims["exception_type"]), Message)
| summarize Errores = count() by ErrorType
| top 10 by Errores desc
content.title: Top tipos de error

content.query:
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| extend dims = column_ifexists("Properties", dynamic({}))
| extend reviewStatus = coalesce(tostring(dims["review_status"]), tostring(dims["status"]), Name)
| extend createdAt = todatetime(coalesce(tostring(dims["created_at"]), tostring(dims["createdAt"]), TimeGenerated))
| where reviewStatus in ("pending", "reminded", "escalated")
| summarize Pendientes = count(), MasAntiguo = min(createdAt)
content.title: Revisiones HITL pendientes activas

properties.description: Operational overview for Verdecora AI Agents albarán processing.
